assertions.evidence: The agent never explicitly classified the task as Simple. It stopped at Step 3 because it discovered the typo did not exist, so it never reached a classification step.
The agent did not reference or implicitly answer the Simple task self-check criteria. It halted at Step 3 upon finding the typo was nonexistent.
The agent did not create an execution plan or ask for human approval. It proceeded directly to investigate the file.
No fix was made since the typo did not exist, so no build or test validation was run.
